name: Do I get future medical for chronic work illness in West Valley City?

mainEntity.name: Do I get future medical for chronic work illness in West Valley City?

acceptedAnswer.description: Yes, if related to the claim and reasonable.[5] Utah requires ongoing care for residuals.[9] Key factors: (1) doctor recommendation; (2) work nexus; (3) cost reasonableness. Fight denials with prognosis. Annual re-evals. Secures long-term support.
